name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Communication with a Potential Hostile IP Address (Flows Reference Sets)
notes:
This Building Block defines communication with a potential hostile IP Address, categorized by reference sets.

Note: The reference sets starting with "XFE ATPF" prefixes are automatically managed by the Threat Intelligence App. This requires a paid subscription.

The other reference sets provided by the Threat Intelligence App can be used to include third party Threat Intelligence feeds. Tune these Reference Sets with the adapted Time to Live for each element.

See the blog https://ibm.biz/BdPEXv for details.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Communication with a Potential Hostile IP Address (Flows Reference Sets) on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the flow context is Local to Local

when the flow matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-mw_ipv4',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-mw_ipv6',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-bots_ipv4',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-bots_ipv6',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-c2server_ipv4',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-c2server_ipv6',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-anonsvcs_ipv4',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-anonsvcs_ipv6',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-cryptomining_ipv4',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-cryptomining_ipv6',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-mw_ipv4',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-mw_ipv6',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-bots_ipv4',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-bots_ipv6',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-c2server_ipv4',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-c2server_ipv6',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-anonsvcs_ipv4',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-anonsvcs_ipv6',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-cryptomining_ipv4',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-cryptomining_ipv6',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware IPs',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Botnet IPs',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Botnet C&C IPs',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Phishing IPs',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Anonymizer IPs',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware IPs',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Botnet IPs',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Botnet C&C IPs',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Phishing IPs',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Anonymizer IPs',sourceip) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Communication with a Potential Hostile IP Address (Flows Reference Sets) on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND NOT when the flow context is Local to Local

AND when the flow matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-mw_ipv4',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-mw_ipv6',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-bots_ipv4',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-bots_ipv6',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-c2server_ipv4',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-c2server_ipv6',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-anonsvcs_ipv4',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-anonsvcs_ipv6',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-cryptomining_ipv4',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-cryptomining_ipv6',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-mw_ipv4',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-mw_ipv6',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-bots_ipv4',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-bots_ipv6',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-c2server_ipv4',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-c2server_ipv6',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-anonsvcs_ipv4',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-anonsvcs_ipv6',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-cryptomining_ipv4',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('XFE ATPF-cryptomining_ipv6',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware IPs',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Botnet IPs',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Botnet C&C IPs',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Phishing IPs',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Anonymizer IPs',destinationip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware IPs',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Botnet IPs',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Botnet C&C IPs',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Phishing IPs',sourceip) OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Anonymizer IPs',sourceip) AQL filter query
